query:
-- Wineology: match "Standard" voice item to the CommsCode Inbound Voice service
UPDATE billing_items 
SET serviceExternalId = 'svc-wineology-cc', matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'medium'
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND customerExternalId = 'C0290' AND matchStatus = 'unmatched';

-- Create assignments for all remaining unassigned matched DataGate items
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system',
  'auto',
  CONCAT('DataGate auto-match: ', bi.description)
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.matchStatus = 'matched'
AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
  WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
);

-- Update revenues for newly matched services
UPDATE services s
SET s.monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT SUM(bi.lineAmount)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  AND bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
  AND bi.matchStatus = 'matched'
  AND bi.category = 'recurring'
)
WHERE s.externalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT serviceExternalId FROM billing_items 
  WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND matchStatus = 'matched' AND serviceExternalId != '' AND category = 'recurring'
)
AND (s.monthlyRevenue = 0 OR s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL);

-- Final summary
SELECT matchStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(lineAmount), 2) as totalRevenue
FROM billing_items WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
GROUP BY matchStatus;
